title: Letting Go
author: David R. Hawkins
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A hand releasing a small red dot. Just a hand outline (open palm, fingers up) with a red dot at its center that's slightly 'floating' above the palm line. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1700)" fill="none">
    <!-- Hand outline as a stylized 5-finger shape: 1 palm rect + 5 finger rects -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round">
      <!-- palm -->
      <rect x="-160" y="0" width="320" height="380" rx="20"/>
      <!-- thumb (left, short) -->
      <rect x="-280" y="40" width="120" height="180" rx="60"/>
      <!-- pinky -->
      <rect x="160" y="20" width="80" height="220" rx="40"/>
      <!-- ring -->
      <rect x="60" y="-100" width="80" height="320" rx="40"/>
      <!-- middle -->
      <rect x="-50" y="-160" width="80" height="380" rx="40"/>
      <!-- index -->
      <rect x="-160" y="-120" width="80" height="340" rx="40"/>
    </g>
    <!-- A small RED dot above the palm — what the hand is letting go of -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="-100" r="22" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- Vertical lines (the dots' trail upward, suggesting release) -->
    <g stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.5">
      <line x1="-20" y1="-140" x2="-20" y2="-220"/>
      <line x1="20" y1="-140" x2="20" y2="-260"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="-140" x2="0" y2="-300"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Caption -->
    <text x="0" y="500" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">RELEASE</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A 5-finger stylized hand outline (palm + 5 fingers, hairline stroke) holds nothing. A red dot floats just above the palm — the thing being let go. Three short red lines trail upward from the dot, suggesting it was once closer. Title is 420px weight 300 whisper, the hand is centered low. The composition is a single act of release rendered without sentimentality.
